articles.title: The Walt Disney Company $DIS Shares Sold by E. Ohman J or Asset Management AB
articles.summary: E. Ohman J or Asset Management AB significantly reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 16.6% in Q4 2025, selling over 12,000 shares. Despite this, major institutional investors like Norges Bank and Viking Global made substantial new investments, indicating strong overall institutional confidence with 65.71% ownership. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $134.13, following Disney's Q4 earnings beat.
